agent.name: Builder Lifecycle Sentinel
agent.description: A compact local QA agent for the Ruh agent builder that performs one manual, evidence-backed readiness pass over a fresh create-flow.

skills.name: Collect Local Evidence
skills.description: Collect bounded read-only evidence from workspace files, OpenClaw/Ruh local runtime surfaces, Docker/Podman state, and logs.

skills.name: Verify Builder Lifecycle
skills.description: Evaluate deterministic Environment, Think, Plan, Build, Review/Test, and Ship Guardrail checks against collected evidence.

skills.name: Render Readiness Report
skills.description: Render concise chat summaries and dashboard-ready readiness views from QA run, check, artifact, and evidence data.

steps.description: Resolve target workspace/session and collect local evidence/artifact inventory with bounded reads.
Run deterministic lifecycle checks and compute overall status.
Render operator-facing summary and dashboard data.

tables.name: qa_runs
tables.description: One manual QA pass over a target builder create-flow.

columns.name: target_agent_name
columns.description: Expected agent name, normally Builder Lifecycle Sentinel.

columns.name: target_session_id
columns.description: Relevant builder/create-flow session id when known.

columns.name: overall_status
columns.description: running, ready, not_ready, blocked_unknown, or error.

columns.name: created_by
columns.description: Operator or channel identity when available.

columns.name: freshness_anchor
columns.description: Timestamp/session marker used for freshness checks.

tables.name: artifacts
tables.description: Expected lifecycle files and their freshness/exact-agent status.

columns.name: artifact_type
columns.description: research_brief, prd, trd, architecture_json, plan_md, soul, agents, identity, skill, manifest, or log.

columns.name: exact_agent_match
columns.description: 1 if content matches Builder Lifecycle Sentinel mission.

tables.name: evidence_items
tables.description: Bounded evidence snippets and structured probe values supporting check results.

columns.name: source_type
columns.description: file, session_status, sessions_history, cli, docker, podman, log, api, or operator_input.

columns.name: source_locator
columns.description: Path, command, session key, endpoint, or log locator.

columns.name: structured_value_json
columns.description: Structured evidence payload as JSON text.

columns.name: redacted
columns.description: 1 if secrets or sensitive data were redacted.

columns.name: stage
columns.description: environment, think, plan, build, review_test, or ship_guardrail.

columns.name: primary_evidence_id
columns.description: Primary evidence item supporting this result.

tables.name: run_events
tables.description: Chronological activity feed for the QA run.

columns.name: event_type
columns.description: probe_started, probe_complete, check_failed, report_rendered, or similar.

apiEndpoints.responseShape: { runs: Array<{ id: string, targetAgentName: string, targetWorkspace: string, startedAt: string, finishedAt?: string, overallStatus: string, summary?: string }> }

apiEndpoints.description: Return run summary and lifecycle stage counts.
apiEndpoints.responseShape: { id: string, overallStatus: string, stageSummaries: Array<{ stage: string, status: string, pass: number, fail: number, unknown: number, skipped: number }> }

apiEndpoints.description: Return check results with filtering by stage/status/severity.
apiEndpoints.responseShape: { checks: Array<{ checkKey: string, stage: string, severity: string, status: string, expected: string, actual?: string, primaryEvidenceId?: string, remediation?: string }> }

apiEndpoints.description: Return artifact inventory for the run.
apiEndpoints.responseShape: { artifacts: Array<{ artifactType: string, path: string, exists: boolean, modifiedAt?: string, sha256?: string, exactAgentMatch?: boolean, freshnessStatus: string, parseStatus: string }> }

apiEndpoints.description: Return bounded evidence entries with optional source/check filtering.
apiEndpoints.responseShape: { evidence: Array<{ id: string, sourceType: string, sourceLocator: string, capturedAt: string, excerpt?: string, confidence: string, redacted: boolean }> }

dashboardPages.title: Builder Lifecycle Sentinel Readiness
dashboardPages.description: Overview of the latest manual local QA run and lifecycle stage status.

dashboardPages.title: Check Details
dashboardPages.description: Detailed pass/fail/unknown lifecycle checks with remediation and evidence references.

dashboardPages.title: Artifact Inventory
dashboardPages.description: Expected create-flow artifacts with freshness, exact-agent, parse, and existence status.

dashboardPages.title: Evidence Log
dashboardPages.description: Bounded redacted local evidence gathered during the QA run.

triggers.name: Manual Fresh Create-Flow QA Pass
triggers.message: Run Builder Lifecycle Sentinel on the latest or specified fresh create-flow using local-only read-only evidence.

envVars.label: Default workspace
envVars.description: Default workspace path to inspect when the operator does not specify one.

envVars.label: Default target agent name
envVars.description: Expected agent name used for exact-agent checks.

envVars.label: Maximum log files
envVars.description: Maximum number of local log files to inspect per run.

envVars.label: Maximum log bytes per file
envVars.description: Maximum bytes read from any one log file.

envVars.label: Maximum stored log excerpt bytes
envVars.description: Maximum bytes stored in one evidence excerpt.

envVars.label: Command timeout milliseconds
envVars.description: Timeout for read-only local CLI probes.

envVars.label: Log command timeout milliseconds
envVars.description: Timeout for bounded log inspection probes.

envVars.label: Require explicit ship approval
envVars.description: When true, ship/deploy readiness is never assumed without operator approval evidence.

envVars.label: Allow external calls
envVars.description: Must remain false for this local-only Sentinel.

vectorCollections.name: builder_lifecycle_failure_patterns
vectorCollections.description: Summarized non-secret failure patterns and remediation notes from prior QA runs.
vectorCollections.embeddedContent: Concise failed-check summaries, remediation notes, and operator-confirmed root causes.
vectorCollections.usage: Suggest likely causes and remediation in future runs.

vectorCollections.name: builder_lifecycle_docs_context
vectorCollections.description: Non-secret local docs about expected builder lifecycle artifacts and phase contracts.
vectorCollections.embeddedContent: Curated docs snippets, not raw logs or secrets.
vectorCollections.usage: Improve explanations and reduce brittle hardcoding.
